name: VIRTUS INVESTMENT PARTNERS, INC.
business: Virtus Investment Partners, Inc. provides investment management and related services to institutions and individuals. It offers a multi-manager, multi-style approach with investment strategies across various asset classes, geographies, and styles. The company earns primarily from asset-based fees charged for services including investment management, fund administration, distribution, and shareholder services.
sellsTo: institutional clients (corporations, multi-employer retirement funds, public employee retirement systems, foundations, endowments)
individual investors through retail funds, ETFs, closed-end funds, and separate accounts
financial intermediaries (national and regional broker-dealers, independent broker-dealers, registered investment advisers, banks, insurance companies)

exposures.sentence: Consists of real estate securities, managed futures, event-driven, infrastructure, and other strategies.

On December 15, 2025, the Company completed the acquisition of a 35% minority interest in Crescent Cove Advisors, LP ("Crescent Cove"), an investment manager specializing in private capital solutions, for $41.1 million.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of minority interest in Crescent Cove Advisors
catalysts.sentence: On December 15, 2025, the Company completed the acquisition of a 35% minority interest in Crescent Cove Advisors, LP ("Crescent Cove"), an investment manager specializing in private capital solutions, for $41.1 million.

catalysts.event: Agreement to acquire majority interest in Keystone National Group
catalysts.sentence: On December 5, 2025, the Company entered into an agreement to acquire a majority interest in Keystone National Group ("Keystone"), an investment manager specializing in asset-centric private credit... The transaction is expected to close in the first quarter of 2026, subject to customary closing conditions, necessary regulatory approvals and client approvals, including approvals by the Keystone registered fund shareholders.
On September 26, 2025, the Company refinanced its existing credit agreement by entering into a new agreement (the "Credit Agreement").
